generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I find it concerning that some politicians want to weaken our alliance commitments. Our partners rely on us just as we rely on them. Cutting back now would send the wrong signal to both allies and adversaries. We've maintained this balance for decades - why risk destabilizing it? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
